title: धन्य धन्य हो प्रभु
author: Traditional

scriptureRefs.note: Bless the LORD, O my soul: and all that is within me, bless his holy name
Now therefore, our God, we thank thee, and praise thy glorious name

story: A traditional Hindi worship bhajan expressing gratitude and blessing to the Lord. This hymn has been a treasured part of North Indian Christian worship for generations, sung in churches from Punjab to Bihar. Its meditative quality makes it suitable for both congregational worship and personal devotion.

lines: धन्य धन्य हो प्रभु धन्य धन्य हो
तेरी करुणा का कोई अंत नहीं
धन्य धन्य हो प्रभु धन्य धन्य हो
linesRomanized: Dhanya dhanya ho Prabhu dhanya dhanya ho
Teri karuna ka koi ant nahin
Dhanya dhanya ho Prabhu dhanya dhanya ho

lines: तूने हमें बनाया तूने हमें सँवारा
linesRomanized: Tune hamein banaayaa tune hamein sanvaaraa
